(209) 667-3788

895 NAPA AVENUE, #A-5
MORRO BAY, CALIFORNIA 93442
(805) 772-1287

KENNETH L. MADDY

SELECT COMMITTEES:
BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT
CALIFORNIA'S WINE INDUSTRY
CENTRAL COAST CONCERNS
GOVERNMENTAL EFFICIENCY
INFANT AND CHILD CARE
AND DEVELOPMENT
PACIFIC RIM

SENATOR, FOURTEENTH DISTRICT

REPUBLICAN FLOOR LEADER

June 20, 1990

John Larson, Chairman
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 "J" Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, California 95814

Dear John:

This is to request an advice letter on the following:

Would the following statement written on a
contribution check to a candidate controlled committee or in
an accompanying letter, prohibit these funds from being
contributed to a ballot measure committee controlled either
by the same candidate, another candidate or a
non-candidate-controlled committee?

Statement: "This contribution can only be used for
the campaign of the recipient."

Please feel free to contact me with any questions. I
will appreciate your responding as soon as possible.

Sincerely,

Kenneth L. Maddy
Senate Republican Leader
